ObjectStates.Name: BlockSquare
ObjectStates.Description: Drop a deck or card on top, then click "Fix Images".
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
-- Scryfall Image Proxy Fixer (board)
-- Place a deck or card on top of this board and press "Fix Card Images".
-- It rewrites old and new Scryfall image URLs to load through the proxy server.
-- Edit PROXY_BASE if your server lives somewhere else.

PROXY_BASE = "https://tts-magic-booster.fly.dev"

local PROXIED_HOSTS = {
  ["cards.scryfall.io"] = true,
  ["backs.scryfall.io"] = true,
  ["c1.scryfall.com"] = true,
}

-- Turn a Scryfall image URL into a proxied one, keeping the ?timestamp query (the bare path 404s on Scryfall's CDN).
-- Returns (newURL, changed).
local function rewriteURL(url)
  if type(url) ~= "string" then return url, false end

  -- Convert legacy c1.scryfall.com URLs to the modern cards.scryfall.io format.
  url = url:gsub(
    "^https://c1%.scryfall%.com/file/scryfall%-cards/([^/]+)/",
    "https://cards.scryfall.io/%1/"
  )

  -- Convert legacy img.scryfall.com card URLs to the modern cards.scryfall.io format.
  url = url:gsub(
    "^https://img%.scryfall%.com/cards/([^/]+)/",
    "https://cards.scryfall.io/%1/"
  )

  -- Convert legacy img.scryfall.com card back URLs to the modern backs.scryfall.io format.
  -- Example:
  --   https://img.scryfall.com/card_backs/image/normal/0a/file.jpg
  -- becomes
  --   https://backs.scryfall.io/normal/0/a/file.jpg
  url = url:gsub(
    "^https://img%.scryfall%.com/card_backs/image/([^/]+)/([0-9a-f])([0-9a-f])/",
    "https://backs.scryfall.io/%1/%2/%3/"
  )

  local host, rest = url:match("^https?://([^/]+)/(.+)$")
  if host and PROXIED_HOSTS[host] then
    return PROXY_BASE .. "/i/" .. host .. "/" .. rest, true
  end

  return url, false
end

-- Recursively rewrite every string in a saved-object data table. Covers the
-- deck-level CustomDeck, each ContainedObjects entry, and any States
-- (double-faced cards). Returns true if anything changed.
local function fixData(t)
  local changed = false
  for k, v in pairs(t) do
    if type(v) == "string" then
      local nv, didChange = rewriteURL(v)
      if didChange then
        t[k] = nv
        changed = true
      end
    elseif type(v) == "table" then
      if fixData(v) then
        changed = true
      end
    end
  end
  return changed
end

-- Find Deck/Card objects currently resting on top of the board via a box cast
-- across the board's footprint.
local function objectsOnBoard()
  local b = self.getBounds()
  local hits = Physics.cast({
    origin = self.getPosition() + vector(0, 2.5, 0),
    direction = vector(0, 1, 0),
    type = 3,
    size = vector(b.size.x, 5, b.size.z),
    max_distance = 0,
  })

  local found, seen = {}, {}
  for _, hit in ipairs(hits) do
    local o = hit.hit_object
    if o and o ~= self and not seen[o.getGUID()] then
      local n = o.name
      if n == "Deck" or n == "Card" or n == "CardCustom" then
        seen[o.getGUID()] = true
        table.insert(found, o)
      end
    end
  end

  return found
end

function fixDeck(obj, player_clicker_color, alt_click)
  local targets = objectsOnBoard()

  if #targets == 0 then
    broadcastToColor(
      "Place a deck or card on the board first.",
      player_clicker_color,
      {1, 0.8, 0.2}
    )
    return
  end

  local fixedCount = 0

  for _, obj in ipairs(targets) do
    local data = obj.getData()
    if fixData(data) then
      destroyObject(obj)
      spawnObjectData({ data = data })
      fixedCount = fixedCount + 1
    end
  end

  if fixedCount > 0 then
    broadcastToColor(
      "Fixed images for " .. fixedCount .. " object(s).",
      player_clicker_color,
      {0.2, 1, 0.2}
    )
  else
    broadcastToColor(
      "No fixable images found.",
      player_clicker_color,
      {1, 0.8, 0.2}
    )
  end
end

function onLoad()
  self.createButton({
    click_function = "fixDeck",
    function_owner = self,
    label = "Fix Images",
    position = {0, 0.56, 0},
    rotation = {0, 0, 0},
    width = 400,
    height = 180,
    font_size = 60,
    color = {0.1, 0.45, 0.9},
    font_color = {1, 1, 1},
  })
end
